evals.prompt: I just loaded the skill-creator skill. I want to create a new skill for formatting CSV files. Can you help me get started?
evals.expected_output: Loads all bundled resources from skill-creator (scripts/, references/, agents/, assets/) and suggests relevant complementary skills like documentation-and-adrs or writing-plans

evals.prompt: I'm working on a VRChat world and just invoked the unity-vrc-udon-sharp skill. I need to write a synced variable system for player data persistence.
evals.expected_output: Loads any bundled resources from unity-vrc-udon-sharp, then suggests unity-vrc-world-sdk-3 as a complementary skill since VRChat world development typically needs both

evals.prompt: I loaded the caveman skill. Now help me write a brief commit message for adding error handling to the API layer.
evals.expected_output: Checks caveman skill for bundled resources (likely none), then considers if conventional-commit skill would be complementary for commit message formatting
